decisions.rationale: Compact spreadsheet-like view familiar to suppliers
Start with product-level status, allow detail when needed

decisions.decision: Supplier creates agenda, client approves, admin enters actuals
decisions.rationale: User-specified workflow — reverses current model where admin creates and supplier fills actuals
Based on physical reports received from factory

decisions.decision: Components inside Production Schedule page (not separate PO page)
decisions.rationale: Risk correlation between component ETA and production dates is the core value
User chose most interactive option — inline edit, auto-save, no modals
